title: Full-page hopeful background image for Community Testimonials page

requirements.summary: Render a full-viewport, cover-style hopeful transformation background image behind all Testimonials page content with a readability overlay that preserves interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: The Testimonials page background is an image (not a gradient) and spans the full viewport and scroll height (cover, centered, no tiling).
Foreground content (header, form, testimonial cards, footer) remains readable on top of the background via a suitable overlay (e.g., translucent + optional blur).
The background does not interfere with page interactions (no layout shifts; scrolling and form submission work as before).

file_operations.description: Replace the current gradient page wrapper with a layered background treatment: a fixed full-viewport background image (cover/center/no-repeat) behind all content, plus a translucent overlay (optionally with backdrop blur) for readability. Ensure the background layers are non-interactive (e.g., pointer-events none) and that header/main/footer remain in the foreground content layer without affecting existing scrolling or form submission behavior.

requirements.summary: Add and reference the generated butterfly-sunrise background image as a static asset for Testimonials page usage.
acceptanceCriteria: The new background image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename specified in imageRequirements.required.
TestimonialsPage.tsx references the new image via a /assets/generated/... path and renders it as the page background.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static background image asset for the Testimonials page at this exact path and filename so it can be referenced directly by the frontend (no backend involvement).

Reference the static asset at /assets/generated/im-fine-bg-testimonials-butterfly-sunrise.dim_1920x1080.png as the Testimonials page background image source, ensuring it is rendered as the full-page background behind all page content.
